should_trigger.prompt: What command should I use for this task?
Route this request to the right workflow
Help me pick the right /rb: command
Help me with intent detection patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Plan a new feature for user auth
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: I want to do something but I'm not sure which command to use
After fixing the bug, also check if intent detection needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Show me all available plugin commands and features
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
